mirror_tables.name: ticker
mirror_tables.source_sql: SELECT id, symbol, exchange, country FROM trading.ticker
mirror_tables.insert_sql: INSERT INTO trading.bt_mirror_ticker(ticker_id, symbol, exchange, country) VALUES (:id, :symbol, :exchange, :country)

mirror_tables.name: sector
mirror_tables.source_sql: SELECT id, code, system AS name, NULL::timestamptz AS created_at, NULL::timestamptz AS updated_at FROM trading.sector
mirror_tables.insert_sql: INSERT INTO trading.bt_mirror_sector(sector_id, code, name, created_at, updated_at) VALUES (:id, :code, :name, :created_at, :updated_at) ON CONFLICT (sector_id) DO UPDATE SET code = EXCLUDED.code, name = EXCLUDED.name, updated_at = EXCLUDED.updated_at

mirror_tables.name: industry
mirror_tables.source_sql: SELECT id, sector_id, code, system AS name, NULL::timestamptz AS created_at, NULL::timestamptz AS updated_at FROM trading.industry
mirror_tables.insert_sql: INSERT INTO trading.bt_mirror_industry(industry_id, sector_id, code, name, created_at, updated_at) VALUES (:id, :sector_id, :code, :name, :created_at, :updated_at) ON CONFLICT (industry_id) DO UPDATE SET sector_id = EXCLUDED.sector_id, code = EXCLUDED.code, name = EXCLUDED.name, updated_at = EXCLUDED.updated_at

mirror_tables.name: ticker_industry
mirror_tables.source_sql: SELECT id, ticker_id, industry_id, TRUE AS is_primary, NULL::timestamptz AS created_at, NULL::timestamptz AS updated_at FROM trading.ticker_industry
mirror_tables.insert_sql: INSERT INTO trading.bt_mirror_ticker_industry(ticker_id, industry_id, is_primary, created_at, updated_at) VALUES (:ticker_id, :industry_id, :is_primary, :created_at, :updated_at) ON CONFLICT (ticker_id, industry_id) DO UPDATE SET is_primary = EXCLUDED.is_primary, updated_at = EXCLUDED.updated_at

mirror_tables.name: ohlcv_daily
mirror_tables.source_sql: SELECT o.ticker_id, t.symbol, o.trade_date, o.open, o.high, o.low, o.close, o.volume, o.updated_at FROM trading.ohlcv_daily o JOIN trading.ticker t ON t.id = o.ticker_id WHERE o.open IS NOT NULL AND o.high IS NOT NULL AND o.low IS NOT NULL AND o.close IS NOT NULL
mirror_tables.insert_sql: INSERT INTO trading.bt_mirror_ohlcv_daily(ticker_id, symbol, trade_date, open, high, low, close, volume) VALUES (:ticker_id, :symbol, :trade_date, :open, :high, :low, :close, :volume) ON CONFLICT (ticker_id, trade_date) DO UPDATE SET symbol = EXCLUDED.symbol, open = EXCLUDED.open, high = EXCLUDED.high, low = EXCLUDED.low, close = EXCLUDED.close, volume = EXCLUDED.volume

mirror_tables.name: macro_data_series
mirror_tables.source_sql: SELECT id, title AS name, frequency, units AS unit, is_active, created_at, updated_at FROM trading.macro_data_series
mirror_tables.insert_sql: INSERT INTO trading.macro_data_series(id, name, frequency, unit, is_active, created_at, updated_at) VALUES (:id, :name, :frequency, :unit, :is_active, :created_at, :updated_at) ON CONFLICT (id) DO UPDATE SET name = EXCLUDED.name, frequency = EXCLUDED.frequency, unit = EXCLUDED.unit, is_active = EXCLUDED.is_active, updated_at = EXCLUDED.updated_at

mirror_tables.name: macro_data_series_value
mirror_tables.source_sql: SELECT id, series_id, obs_date, value, ingested_at AS created_at, ingested_at AS updated_at FROM trading.macro_data_series_value
mirror_tables.insert_sql: INSERT INTO trading.macro_data_series_value(id, series_id, obs_date, value, created_at, updated_at) VALUES (:id, :series_id, :obs_date, :value, :created_at, :updated_at) ON CONFLICT (id) DO UPDATE SET series_id = EXCLUDED.series_id, obs_date = EXCLUDED.obs_date, value = EXCLUDED.value, updated_at = EXCLUDED.updated_at
